violations.description: Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Slicer in deli needs cleaned more thoroughly.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Fan covers in deli walk in cooler need cleaned.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Wet mops in buckets in meat walk in cooler and in deli.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
